mapper.insert: insert into adoptions (cat_name, applicant_name, phone, housing, experience) values (#{catName}, #{applicantName}, #{phone}, #{housing}, #{experience})
mapper.select: select a.id, a.cat_name, a.applicant_name, a.phone, a.housing, a.experience, a.apply_date, c.status as cat_status from adoptions a left join cats c on a.cat_name = c.name order by a.id desc
